title: Translating Python Code with Decorators to Java Code with Annotations
scenario: A user wants to translate a complex Python code with decorators into equivalent Java code with annotations. The Java code must be readable, maintainable, and efficient. The user needs help on how to define the Java class and handle decorators such as logging and authentication. The target Java code must be accurate and well-documented.
constraints: Must use the latest Java syntax
Must include a brief explanation of the translation process

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the Python to Java code translation
The readability and maintainability of the Java code
The accuracy and correctness of the Java annotations used
The quality and clarity of the documentation provided
